metadata.description: Tests whether PRMP benefit requires end-to-end gradient flow through the prediction MLP, or operates as a structural skip-connection. 4 variants × 3 seeds × 2 datasets.

variants.A_Standard: Baseline SAGEConv with mean aggregation, no prediction mechanism
variants.B_Full_PRMP: Full PRMP with end-to-end gradient flow through pred_mlp
variants.C_Detached_PRMP: PRMP with detached prediction (pred_mlp output .detach()), no direct gradient through predictions
variants.D_Frozen_PRMP: PRMP with frozen random pred_mlp (Xavier init, requires_grad=False)

amazon.interpretation: B ≈ C >> D: Prediction quality matters but not gradient flow → 'representation structure'

examples.output: {"improvements_vs_baseline_pct": {"B_Full_PRMP": -0.25, "C_Detached_PRMP": 1.59, "D_Frozen_PRMP": -0.02}, "cohens_d": {"A_vs_B_Full_PRMP": -0.3529, "A_vs_C_Detached_PRMP": 1.5807, "A_vs_D_Frozen_PRMP": -0.0284, "B_Full_PRMP_vs_C_Detached_PRMP": 1.7537, "B_Full_PRMP_vs_D_Frozen_PRMP": 0.3021, "C_Detached_PRMP_vs_D_Frozen_PRMP": -1.542}, "interpretation": "B \u2248 C >> D: Prediction quality matters but not gradient flow \u2192 'representation structure'"}
